description:
Supabase API generated from the OpenAPI specification.
Visit [https://supabase.com/docs](https://supabase.com/docs) for a complete documentation.

tools.name: branches_delete-a-branch
tools.description: Deletes the specified database branch. By default, deletes immediately. Use force=false to schedule deletion with 1-hour grace period (only when soft deletion is enabled). Required: branch_id_or_ref. Optional: force (default: true). Returns the BranchDeleteResponse. Destructive.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

params.name: force
params.description: If set to false, schedule deletion with 1-hour grace period (only when soft deletion is enabled).

tools.name: branches_get-a-branch-config
tools.description: Fetches configurations of the specified database branch. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Returns the BranchDetailResponse.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

tools.name: branches_update-a-branch-config
tools.description: Updates the configuration of the specified database branch. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Optional: branch_name, git_branch, notify_url (plus 4 more). Returns the updated BranchResponse.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

params.name: notify_url
params.description: HTTP endpoint to receive branch status updates.

params.name: reset_on_push
params.description: This field is deprecated and will be ignored. Use v1-reset-a-branch endpoint directly instead.

tools.name: branches_diff_a-branch
tools.description: Diffs the specified database branch. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Optional: included_schemas, pgdelta.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

params.name: pgdelta
params.description: Use pg-delta instead of Migra for diffing when true

tools.name: branches_merge_a-branch
tools.description: Merges the specified database branch. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Optional: migration_version. Returns the new BranchUpdateResponse.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

tools.name: branches_push_a-branch
tools.description: Pushes the specified database branch. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Optional: migration_version. Returns the new BranchUpdateResponse.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

tools.name: branches_reset_a-branch
tools.description: Resets the specified database branch. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Optional: migration_version. Returns the new BranchUpdateResponse.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

tools.name: branches_restore_a-branch
tools.description: Cancels scheduled deletion and restores the branch to active state. Required: branch_id_or_ref. Returns the new BranchRestoreResponse.

params.name: branch_id_or_ref
params.description: Branch ref or deprecated branch ID

tools.name: organizations_get-an
tools.description: Gets information about the organization. Required: slug. Returns the V1OrganizationSlugResponse.

tools.description: Returns a list of organizations that you currently belong to.

tools.description: Returns the entitlements available to the organization based on their plan and any overrides. Required: slug.

tools.name: organizations_projects_get-all-for-organization
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of projects for the specified organization. This endpoint uses offset-based pagination. Use the `offset` parameter to skip a number of projects and the `limit` parameter to control the number of projects returned per page. Required: slug. Optional: offset (default: 0), limit (default: 100), search (plus 2 more).

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of projects to return per page

params.name: statuses
params.description: A comma-separated list of project statuses to filter by. The following values are supported: `ACTIVE_HEALTHY`, `INACTIVE`.

tools.name: projects_create-a
tools.description: Create a project. Required: db_pass, name, organization_slug. Optional: desired_instance_size, kps_enabled, organization_id (plus 4 more). Returns the new V1ProjectResponse.

params.name: desired_instance_size
params.description: Desired instance size. Omit this field to always default to the smallest possible size.

params.name: kps_enabled
params.description: This field is deprecated and is ignored in this request

params.name: plan
params.description: Subscription Plan is now set on organization level and is ignored in this request

params.name: region
params.description: Region you want your server to reside in. Use region_selection instead.

params.name: region_selection
params.description: Region selection. Only one of region or region_selection can be specified.

params.name: template_url
params.description: Template URL used to create the project from the CLI.

tools.description: Deletes the given project. Required: ref. Returns the V1ProjectRefResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_get-available-regions
tools.description: [Beta] Gets the list of available regions that can be used for a new project. Required: organization_slug. Optional: continent, desired_instance_size. Returns the RegionsInfo.

params.name: continent
params.description: Continent code to determine regional recommendations: NA (North America), SA (South America), EU (Europe), AF (Africa), AS (Asia), OC (Oceania), AN (Antarctica)

params.name: desired_instance_size
params.description: Desired instance size. Omit this field to always default to the smallest possible size.

tools.name: projects_analytics_get-project-logs
tools.description: Executes a SQL query on the project's logs. Either the `iso_timestamp_start` and `iso_timestamp_end` parameters must be provided. If both are not provided, only the last 1 minute of logs will be queried. The timestamp range must be no more than 24 hours and is rounded to the nearest minute. If the range is more than 24 hours, a validation error will be thrown. Note: Unless the `sql` parameter is provided, only edge_logs will be queried. See the [log query docs](/docs/guides/telemetry/logs?queryGroups=product&product=postgres&queryGroups=source&source=edge_logs#querying-with-the-logs-explorer:~:text=logs%20from%20the-,Sources,-drop%2Ddown%3A) for all available sources. Required: ref. Optional: sql, iso_timestamp_start, iso_timestamp_end. Returns the AnalyticsResponse.

params.name: sql
params.description: Custom SQL query to execute on the logs. See [querying logs](/docs/guides/telemetry/logs?queryGroups=product&product=postgres&queryGroups=source&source=edge_logs#querying-with-the-logs-explorer) for more details.

tools.name: projects_jit-access_get-config
tools.description: [Beta] Get project's temporary access configuration. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_jit-access_update-config
tools.description: [Beta] Update project's temporary access configuration. Required: ref, state.

tools.name: projects_network-bans_delete
tools.description: [Beta] Remove network bans. Required: ref, ipv4_addresses. Optional: identifier, requester_ip (default: false). Destructive.

params.name: ipv4_addresses
params.description: List of IP addresses to unban.

params.name: requester_ip
params.description: Include requester's public IP in the list of addresses to unban.

tools.name: projects_network-bans_list-all
tools.description: [Beta] Gets project's network bans. Required: ref. Returns the new NetworkBanResponse.

tools.name: projects_network-bans_list-all-enriched
tools.description: [Beta] Gets project's network bans with additional information about which databases they affect. Required: ref. Returns the new NetworkBanResponseEnriched.

tools.name: projects_network-restrictions_get
tools.description: [Beta] Gets project's network restrictions. Required: ref. Returns the NetworkRestrictionsResponse.

tools.name: projects_network-restrictions_patch
tools.description: [Alpha] Updates project's network restrictions by adding or removing CIDRs. Required: ref. Optional: add, remove. Returns the updated NetworkRestrictionsV2Response.

tools.name: projects_network-restrictions_update
tools.description: [Beta] Updates project's network restrictions. Required: ref. Optional: dbAllowedCidrs, dbAllowedCidrsV6. Returns the new NetworkRestrictionsResponse.

tools.name: projects_pause_a-project
tools.description: Pauses the given project. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_pgsodium_get-config
tools.description: [Beta] Gets project's pgsodium config. Required: ref. Returns the PgsodiumConfigResponse.

tools.name: projects_pgsodium_update-config
tools.description: [Beta] Updates project's pgsodium config. Updating the root_key can cause all data encrypted with the older key to become inaccessible. Required: ref, root_key. Returns the updated PgsodiumConfigResponse.

tools.name: projects_postgrest_get-service-config
tools.description: Gets project's postgrest config. Required: ref. Returns the PostgrestConfigWithJwtsecretResponse.

tools.name: projects_postgrest_update-service-config
tools.description: Updates project's postgrest config. Required: ref. Optional: db_extra_search_path, db_pool, db_schema (plus 1 more). Returns the updated V1PostgrestConfigResponse.

tools.name: projects_read-replicas_remove-a
tools.description: [Beta] Remove a read replica. Required: ref, database_identifier.

tools.name: projects_read-replicas_setup-a
tools.description: [Beta] Set up a read replica. Required: ref, read_replica_region.

params.name: read_replica_region
params.description: Region you want your read replica to reside in

tools.name: projects_readonly_disable-mode-temporarily
tools.description: Disables project's readonly mode for the next 15 minutes. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_readonly_get-mode-status
tools.description: Returns project's readonly mode status. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_restore_a-project
tools.description: Restores the given project. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_restore_cancel-a-project-restoration
tools.description: Cancels the given project restoration. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_restore_list-available-versions
tools.description: Lists available restore versions for the given project. Required: ref. Returns the GetProjectAvailableRestoreVersionsResponse.

tools.name: projects_secrets_bulk-create
tools.description: Creates multiple secrets and adds them to the specified project. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_secrets_bulk-delete
tools.description: Deletes all secrets with the given names from the specified project. Required: ref. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_secrets_list-all
tools.description: Returns all secrets you've previously added to the specified project. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_ssl-enforcement_get-config
tools.description: [Beta] Get project's SSL enforcement configuration. Required: ref. Returns the SslEnforcementResponse.

tools.name: projects_ssl-enforcement_update-config
tools.description: [Beta] Update project's SSL enforcement configuration. Required: ref, requestedConfig. Returns the updated SslEnforcementResponse.

tools.name: projects_storage_list-all-buckets
tools.description: Lists all buckets. Required: ref. Returns array of V1StorageBucketResponse.

tools.name: projects_types_generate-typescript
tools.description: Returns the TypeScript types of your schema for use with supabase-js. Required: ref. Optional: included_schemas (default: public).

tools.name: projects_upgrade_get-postgres-eligibility
tools.description: [Beta] Returns the project's eligibility for upgrades. Required: ref.

tools.name: projects_upgrade_get-postgres-status
tools.description: [Beta] Gets the latest status of the project's upgrade. Required: ref. Optional: tracking_id. Returns the DatabaseUpgradeStatusResponse.

tools.name: projects_upgrade_postgres-version
tools.description: [Beta] Upgrades the project's Postgres version. Required: ref, target_version. Optional: release_channel. Returns the new ProjectUpgradeInitiateResponse.

tools.name: projects_vanity-subdomain_activate-config
tools.description: [Beta] Activates a vanity subdomain for a project. Required: ref, vanity_subdomain. Returns the new ActivateVanitySubdomainResponse.

tools.name: projects_vanity-subdomain_check-availability
tools.description: [Beta] Checks vanity subdomain availability. Required: ref, vanity_subdomain. Returns the new SubdomainAvailabilityResponse.

tools.name: projects_vanity-subdomain_deactivate-config
tools.description: [Beta] Deletes a project's vanity subdomain configuration. Required: ref. Destructive.

tools.name: projects_vanity-subdomain_get-config
tools.description: [Beta] Gets current vanity subdomain config. Required: ref. Returns the VanitySubdomainConfigResponse.

tools.name: snippets_get-a
tools.description: Gets a specific SQL snippet. Required: id. Returns the SnippetResponse.

tools.name: snippets_list-all
tools.description: Lists SQL snippets for the logged in user. Optional: project_ref, cursor, limit (plus 2 more). Returns array of SnippetsListAllItem.

tools.name: supabase-profile_get
tools.description: Gets the user's profile. Returns the V1ProfileResponse.
